name: RightWay Auto Sales
description_short: RightWay Auto Sales is a used car dealership offering in-house auto financing to buyers with all credit profiles, including bad credit, no credit, and bankruptcy histories.
description_long:
RightWay Auto Sales operates as a used car dealership with in-house financing rather than a traditional personal lender. Founded 28 years ago, the company has grown to become a top-5 used car dealer in the nation with 82,000+ customer reviews and an A+ BBB rating. The Louisville, Kentucky location (with multiple locations nationwide based on website structure) specializes in helping customers who struggle to obtain financing elsewhere.

The company offers a full-service auto buying experience including vehicle selection from 2013-2024 model year inventory, financing approval regardless of credit history, and included warranty coverage. Their financing model allows customers to apply online with no credit score impact, receive approval decisions quickly, and drive away the same day. They partner with 30+ banks, credit unions, and finance companies to compete for customer business, offering flexible terms including $0 down options and up to 84-month financing periods.

RightWay distinguishes itself through comprehensive vehicle assurance (6-month/6,000-mile limited warranty, 70-point safety inspection, 24/7 roadside assistance), trade-in programs, and explicit acceptance of all credit types including bankruptcy and repossession histories. Their marketing emphasizes "hassle-free" and "judgment-free" service with friendly staff and no-pressure sales approach. The company also offers vehicle appraisals for trade-ins and cash purchases of customer vehicles.

A critical caveat: While the website claims "guaranteed financing for everyone," this is likely conditional on approval terms and likely includes significantly higher interest rates typical of subprime auto lending. The company targets financially vulnerable consumers (those with bankruptcy, repossession, or no credit history) who have limited alternatives, which raises fair lending concerns common in this sector. Transparency regarding actual APR ranges and total cost of ownership is limited on the public website.
pros: Accepts all credit types including bankruptcy, repossession, SSI/disability income, and no credit history
$0 down payment option available (down payments tailored to individual budgets)
No credit score impact from online application process
Access to 30+ lenders (banks, credit unions, finance companies) competing for business
6-month/6,000-mile limited warranty, 70-point safety inspection, and 24/7 roadside assistance included with all vehicles
Same-day approval and drive-away capability; 3-minute online application process
Large inventory of 3,000+ vehicles (2013-2024 models) across SUVs, trucks, and cars; trade-in and vehicle buyout programs
cons: Website does not disclose APR ranges, making it impossible to assess true cost of borrowing compared to prime lenders
Targets financially vulnerable consumers (subprime auto lending) likely resulting in significantly higher interest rates than traditional lenders
Up to 84-month financing terms may result in negative equity and extended debt obligation
No transparent disclosure of payment estimates or total cost of ownership examples on public-facing website
Limited warranty coverage (6 months/6,000 miles) is relatively short compared to factory warranties on newer vehicles
best_for: Consumers with bad credit, no credit, or recent bankruptcy seeking to purchase a used vehicle
Buyers with limited down payment savings who need $0 down financing options
Individuals with non-traditional income (SSI, disability, tips) unable to qualify with traditional lenders
Customers prioritizing quick approval and same-day vehicle acquisition over lowest total interest cost
diagnosis: RightWay Auto Sales is best for consumers with damaged credit or non-traditional income who cannot qualify for financing elsewhere and prioritize approval speed and minimal down payment over lowest total borrowing cost. The critical caveat is that this is subprime auto lending—APR rates are not disclosed on the website, but customers should expect significantly higher interest costs than prime borrowers; the true affordability of any vehicle should be evaluated based on actual APR quotes before purchase.
services: Used vehicle sales (2013-2024 model year inventory)
Subprime auto financing with $0 down options
Multi-lender pre-qualification (30+ banks, credit unions, finance companies)
Online financing application (3-minute process, no credit score impact)
Vehicle trade-in appraisals and trade-in program
Vehicle purchase/buyout program (any make, model, or condition)
